since_last: 52% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +1.62%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 52% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.18% · BTC -1.55% · Gold +0.31% · Nasdaq100 +2.25%. 52% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +1.62%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +1.62%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.37%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +20.45%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +20.45%, CEVA +6.71%, WDAY +2.73%, AMAT +2.46%, NXPI +2.28%. Laggards: DLR -5.29%, TTD -3.81%, FTNT -1.40%, SAP -1.12%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.07% at $162.43
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.07% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
